director.name: 古斯塔沃·雅恩 Gustavo Jahn

introduction: In a midsummer night's dream, Lucia, a botanist from Rio de Janeiro, encounters a mysterious force called S, which seems to recolor her days and subtly reshape her reality and her network of relationships. Gathering fragments of a lost film, she gradually deciphers the mystery projected onto other bodies and horizons—a thousand times forgotten and remembered again.
